meaning: n.齐名的人,名字被用于命名地方的人
examples: You of course know that an eponym is a word that started out as someone’s name.
I was being interviewed recently and talking about a certain eponym that had morphed after it was first coined.
Eponym is such a kind of vocabulary that is transformed from the proper noun (personal name, place name and trade name). These transformed words can be eponymous nouns, adjectives, adverbs and verbs.
